name: Svg.Editor

values.name: cmd
values.comment: Command to properly initialize the editor

values.name: update
values.type: Svg.Editor.Config -> Svg.Editor.Msg -> Svg.Editor.Model -> ( Svg.Editor.Model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd Svg.Editor.Msg )

name: Svg.Editor.Config

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: The config object. Usually should be created using init or the config utilitiy function
aliases.type: { pointRadius : Basics.Float, zoomControls : Basics.Bool, panControls : Basics.Bool, panWithTouch : Basics.Bool, groups : List.List Types.Label, sceneId : String.String, drag : Draggable.Config ( Types.Key, Types.SubKey ) Msg.Msg }

values.name: config
values.comment:
Create a custom config from a list of properties,
e.g.

    config
        [ groups [ "routes", "rock-faces", "elements" ]
        , pointRadius 2
        , controls { zoom = False, pan = True, drag = False }
        ]

values.name: controls
values.comment: Enable/disable zoom and pan controls in the UI
values.type: { zoom : Basics.Bool, pan : Basics.Bool, drag : Basics.Bool } -> Svg.Editor.Config.Config -> Svg.Editor.Config.Config

values.name: groups
values.comment:
List of allowed groups in scene.

Each element can be in at most a single group and have a unique index in that group.

This is useful, for instance, to mark routes or other highlights on the topo map and
have numbers identifying each element.

values.name: pointRadius
values.comment: Radius of points, when rendered as circles.

values.name: sceneId
values.comment:
Change the default scene id.

This is necessary if two scenes are present in the same screen. Each scene must have a unique id.
